§6Bedrock Oil Extraction§f

§aInfinite crude oil deposits deep underground — extract them with a Fracking Tower for a permanent oil supply!§f

Bedrock Oil Deposits are crude oil deposits that can never be depleted. They are located deep underground in the bedrock layer and require a §bFracking Tower§f to extract. Unlike surface oil reservoirs which can run dry, bedrock oil provides a permanent, infinite source of crude oil for your petrochemical refineries.

§6Locating Bedrock Oil§f:
§b• Surface Indicator§f: Look for patches of dead, oily dirt or sand on the surface — these mark bedrock oil deposits below.
§b• Survey Scanner§f: Hand-held item that scans for deposits in a small radius below you.
§b• Neutrino Lens§f: Advanced detection via satellite with Depth-Resource Scanning Module.

§6Extraction§f:
§b• Fracking Tower§f: The only machine capable of extracting bedrock oil. Requires power, fracking solution (Sulfur + Petroleum), and is slower than a standard Pumpjack/Derrick but yields infinite oil.

§eTip§f: Bedrock oil is your end-game oil supply. Once you have a Fracking Tower running, you never need to scout for new oil deposits again. Mark the oily dirt patches you find early in the game — they are easy to miss later!
